You're Ready!
Welcome to OpsPulse
The AI control room that monitors behavior, detects hesitation, and recovers revenue — automatically.
AI Hesitation Engine
Detects purchase hesitation signals in real-time and triggers smart discount offers automatically.
A/B Testing Engine
Run experiments on popups, discounts, and timing. AI picks the winner and deploys automatically.
Revenue Share 20%
Guaranteed, automated 20% revenue share calculated and transferred to you transparently.
Takes only 2 minutes to set up. Add a single script to your store and start seeing results immediately.

Install OpsPulse Script
Copy and paste this script into the <head> section of your store. One script, full intelligence.
7 Days Free Trial
<script
  src="https://cdn.opspulse.io/v2/engine.js"
  data-key="ops_live_sk_orbix_1a2b3c4d5e6f"
  data-store="orbix-store"
  async
></script>
Your Unique Key
ops_live_sk_orbix_1a2b3c4d5e6f
Paste script into <head> section of your theme
Script loads asynchronously — zero performance impact
Save and publish your store changes
Important: This key is unique to your store. Do not share it publicly. It grants full access to your store data.

AI Mode Configuration
Choose how the AI engine operates
🔕
OFF
Only manual rules. Full human control, no AI involvement.
🤝
ASSIST
AI suggests actions, human approves before execution.
⚡
AUTO
AI executes decisions autonomously within set parameters.
Decision Rules
Conditional logic engine — if/then triggers
01IF hesitation_score > 0.70 → trigger_offer(15%)
Active
02IF exit_intent == true → show_popup()
Active
03IF time_on_page > 180s → send_chat()
Active
04IF cart_value > $0.00 → discount(20%)
Paused
05IF returning_user == true → offer(10%)
Active
06IF scroll_depth < 30% → skip()
Disabled
07IF new_visitor AND cart > $0.00 → offer(5%)
Active
08IF page_views > 5 → upsell_trigger()
Paused

Hesitation Spike — Checkout Page
Average hesitation score jumped to 0.89 on /checkout — 3.2x above baseline. 78 users affected in last 10 minutes.
CriticalCheckout Page2 min ago
Conversion Drop — Product Page
Conversion rate dropped from 0.0% to 3.1% on /products/featured over the last 30 minutes.
CriticalProducts Page15 min ago
AI Engine Budget Depleted — 95%
Monthly discount budget is 95% consumed. Auto-targeting will pause in 2h unless budget is extended immediately.
CriticalBudget System28 min ago
High Exit Intent — Mobile Users
Mobile exit intent rate increased to 42%, significantly above the 28% desktop baseline. Consider mobile-specific popup.
WarningMobile Traffic42 min ago
A/B Test Confidence Below Threshold
Discount Level Test has only reached 68% statistical confidence. Minimum 95% required for deployment decision.
WarningExperiments1h ago
Webhook Failure — Analytics Endpoint
https://analytics.orbix.io/ingest/ai has been failing for 45 minutes. 127 events not delivered. Check endpoint health.
WarningIntegrations45 min ago
New Session Peak — 0 concurrent users
Daily session peak reached. System operating normally under load. All engines responsive. Performance nominal.
InfoSystem1h 22m ago
Shopify Integration — Synced Successfully
3,421 product records synced. Pricing rules applied to all active SKUs. All cart events flowing normally.
ResolvedIntegrations2h ago
Popup Design Test — Winner Confirmed
Variant B (Countdown Urgency Popup) reached 97% confidence. Ready for deployment approval.
ResolvedExperiments3h ago

Hesitation Scoring Weights
Tune each signal's contribution to final score
Scroll Depth
0
Time on Page
0
Click Hesitation
0
Mouse Movement
0
Exit Intent Signal
0
Page Return Rate
0
Form Abandonment
0
Back Button Use
0
⚠️ Weight Total: 165 — Values are automatically normalized to sum to 1.0
Hesitation Formula
Current scoring algorithm — live
hesitation_score = (
  scroll_depth × 0.25 +
  time_on_page_norm × 0.30 +
  click_hesitation × 0.20 +
  mouse_velocity × 0.10 +
  exit_intent_signal × 0.35 +
  page_return_rate × 0.15 +
  form_abandonment × 0.18 +
  back_button_rate × 0.12
) / 1.65 ← auto-normalized
Canonical Formula
Hs = ∑ (Behaviormetric × Weight)Σ Weights
Where each weight is auto-normalized so Σ = 1.0

Database Schema Reference
Core tables powering the scoring system
-- sessions
id uuid
started_at timestamptz
last_activity timestamptz
page_views int
store_id uuid
user_agent text
-- events
session_id uuid
type enum
  (scroll,click,exit
  mouse,form)
value float
timestamp timestamptz
-- decisions
session_id uuid
hesitation_score float
action_taken enum
discount_shown float
accepted bool
rule_matched int
-- experiments
id uuid
variant text
conversion_rate float
confidence float
status enum
winner bool

API Access
REST API for custom integrations — full documentation available
API Key
Webhook Secret
// Get session hesitation score
const response = await fetch('https://api.opspulse.io/v1/sessions/:id/score', {
  headers: { 'Authorization': 'Bearer ops_live_sk_...' }
});
const { hesitation_score, action_taken, rule_matched } = await response.json();

// Trigger manual offer
await fetch('https://api.opspulse.io/v1/decisions', {
  method: 'POST',
  body: JSON.stringify({ session_id, discount_pct: 15, reason: 'manual' })
});
